toolbox_name: SparkFun MAX30105 Pulse Oximeter & Heart Rate Sensor

max30105_init.tooltip: Initialize MAX30105 heart rate/SpO2 sensor (I2C address 0x57)

max30105_setup.message0: MAX30105 %1 Setup LED Power %2 Sample Avg %3 LED Mode %4 Sample Rate %5 Pulse Width %6 ADC Range %7

max30105_safe_check.message0: MAX30105 %1 Wait For Data Timeout %2 ms
max30105_safe_check.tooltip: Wait for new data within timeout, returns true if data available

max30105_get_red.tooltip: Read raw value of the red LED channel

max30105_get_ir.tooltip: Read raw value of the infrared LED channel

max30105_get_green.tooltip: Read raw value of the green LED channel (MAX30105 only)

max30105_shutdown.tooltip: Put MAX30105 into low power shutdown mode

max30105_wakeup.tooltip: Wake MAX30105 from low power mode
